description: Fatal per-event error with exit: make any single item's each-invocation failure terminate the graph. (Conduit terminal errors are fatal by default and need no such wiring; see OG-EX-16.) Mirrors the format spec's Example 8 (error path).

fixtures.name: Fatal error with exit
fixtures.description: The item's each invocation of items.get fails with TIMEOUT_EXCEEDED. onError routes the error event to die, an exit node with error:true, which terminates the graph with an error. The error event is the error detail and is not emitted to the output stream, so output is empty and error is true.
